rationale: Issue split from DRIVERS-2595, Improvement type; proactive maxWireVersion bump for MongoDB 7.0, not a nonconformance.
PyPy/cryptography dependency compatibility; packaging issue with no spec area involvement.
Documentation typo in auth examples (quote vs quote_plus); no driver behavior or spec violation.

Issue split from DRIVERS-2232, Improvement; deprecating commands per MongoDB 7.0, not a nonconformance.

Performance optimization for _type_marker check in BSON C extension; no spec rule involved.
PyOpenSSL file descriptor error in SSL recv path; internal TLS implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Performance optimization for INT2STRING macro in BSON C extension; no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2617, Improvement; proactive change stream >16MB spec rollout, not a nonconformance bug.
Error message improvement when upsert kwarg passed as dict; UX issue, no spec behavior violated.
Feature request to pass overflow integers to fallback_encoder; enhancement, BSON spec doesn't require this.
Missing error check after PyUnicode_FromString in C extension; internal robustness fix, no spec rule.
Driver rejects SRV hostnames with uppercase letters; DNS seedlist spec/RFC allows mixed-case; related to DRIVERS-2668.
Performance optimization caching commonly used strings in BSON C extensions; no spec involvement.
Performance refactor: PyObject_GetItem instead of PyMapping_GetItemString; internal C extension improvement.
Performance optimization for BSON encoding of standard Python dict; no spec rule involved.
Performance optimization for BSON encoding of lists and tuples; no spec involvement.
Type annotation cleanup removing _DocumentIn alias; internal refactor with no behavior change.
Performance optimization for BSON int encoding in C extension; no spec rule involved.
PyMongoCrypt dependency on deprecated distutils breaks Python 3.12; packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Performance optimization replacing PyObject_CallMethod with faster variants in C extension; no spec involvement.
Import error (NameError for socket) after refactor PYTHON-3814; internal code regression, no spec involvement.
Type annotation improvement using overload pattern for _DocumentType; internal API ergonomics, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2384; testing FaaS/Lambda behavior per driver, test infrastructure rollout.
OIDC spec requires reauthentication to work for all operations; bulk_write reauthentication fails with ReauthenticationRequired error.
Internal refactor to reduce duplication in retryable reads/writes logic; no behavior change stated.
Logic bug in Windows install.ps1 script mixing 32/64-bit paths; build toolchain issue, no spec involvement.

Updating Langchain integration to use $vectorSearch; third-party integration update, insufficient detail.

Replacing flake8/isort with ruff for linting; tooling change with no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Adding __repr__ to write result classes for better debugging; developer ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
hint field missing from __eq__/__repr__ in bulk write operation classes; internal API consistency bug, not a spec rule.
Driver wrongly skips killCursors on MaxTimeMSExpired (code 50); cursors spec defines when killCursors must be sent.
Driver incorrectly sets exhaustAllowed on getMores in load-balanced/serverless mode; violates load balancer spec cursor rules.
Build failure: installing pymongo in tox without gcc fails after PYTHON-3760; packaging/build issue, no spec involvement.
Improving error messages for network timeouts with timeout value and elapsed time; UX improvement, no spec violation.

Driver retries on OperationFailure with None/0 error code; retryable reads spec defines exact error conditions for retry.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2666, Improvement; standardizing performance testing infrastructure, not a spec conformance issue.
Improving error message for unknown MongoClient options with did-you-mean suggestions; UX improvement, no spec rule.
Adding xunit-results and other entries to .gitignore; CI/build hygiene, no spec involvement.
tox fails to find setuptools dependency in certain environments; build configuration bug, no spec involvement.
